command: $p = 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\.env'; if (Test-Path $p) { Get-Content $p -Raw } else { Write-Output 'FILE_NOT_FOUND'; Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent' -Filter '*.env*' -Force | Select-Object Name,Length,LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize }
description: Check if .env exists and read it, or list .env* files
